title: Autonomous Structural Intelligence (ASI): From Point Prediction to Structure Prediction
description:
Autonomous Structural Intelligence (ASI) explores a structural-runtime direction for next-generation AI systems. Traditional AI systems are largely dominated by learn-points → predict-points paradigms. ASI investigates the transition toward learn-structures → predict-structures → navigate-structures → evolve-structural-runtimes.

This repository presents the first executable ASI runtime MVP skeleton, including:

1. Vertical-Gap Go-Around Runtime
2. Elastic Trajectory IR
3. Elastic Segment Merge
4. Structure Prediction Runtime

Together, these MVPs demonstrate a first ASI runtime loop:

Observe Structures → Compress Structures → Navigate Structures → Predict Structures → Evolve Structures.

The repository includes Java runtime skeletons, Maven build support, JUnit4 validation tests, Markdown experiment trace generation, and runtime-oriented structural intelligence primitives.

ASI builds on DBM-SI foundations including CCC, CGCCC, SOS, PDS, Two-Phases Search, Differential Trees, and Trajectory Intelligence, while focusing on executable structural runtime evolution.
